prompt: A [building type] in which [one architectural impossibility] has been quietly applied — [lens] wide, the building photorealistic and architecturally coherent in every other respect, [one architectural impossibility] visible throughout as a consistent fact rather than an anomaly, [people in the building] using the space with complete normalcy as if the [one architectural impossibility] is simply how this building works, [light quality] photorealistic and treating the impossible as structurally unremarkable, surrealist architectural world still, 16:9 Create this as a simple cinematic thumbnail still for a prompt library card. Clean single-scene composition. Readable at small size. Strong central subject. No text, no interface chrome, no split panels, no collage, no before-after comparisons.
negative_prompt: text overlay, typography, UI chrome, dashboard, website layout, collage, split screen, diptych, triptych, before-and-after, watermark, logo, cluttered composition, too many objects, cartoon, illustration, duplicate objects, warped geometry, unreadable tiny details

settings.lighting: clean, readable, high-contrast lighting suited for a small homepage or library card
settings.camera_angle: single clear hero framing that matches the prompt
settings.depth_of_field: moderate depth of field for thumbnail readability
settings.quality: clean silhouette, realistic materials, readable at small size
